name: Sinochem International Corporation
summary: Sinochem International Corporation engages in the intermediates and new materials, agrochemicals, polymer additives, and natural rubber businesses worldwide. It offers new materials, including waterborne acrylic emulsions, waterborne polyurethane dispersions, solventborne solution polyurethanes, cross linkers, cyclic rubbers, epoxy resins, organosilicones, chain extenders, sterilization fungicides, and fire retardants; and herbicides, fungicides, insecticides, and plant growth regulators. The company also provides rubber chemicals, such as antioxidant PPD, intermediate RT bases, insoluble sulfur, high-purity TMQ, and accelerators; and natural rubber. In addition, it engages in the chemical trade and distribution businesses, such as automotive materials, polycarbonate, polystyrene, dyed pigment, ABS resin, polyurethane, forest grease, iron ore, and coke. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Sinochem International Corporation is a subsidiary of Sinochem Corporation.
